merit_pixel_id.description:
Will be deprecated soon. 
If `merit_pixel_id` is set while create or updated then `merit_pixels` will be synchronized with it. 
If `merit_pixels` is set while create or updated then `merit_pixel_id` will be synchronized with it. 
Set up (update) both fields at the same time is not supported.

conversion_variable_minutes.description: Deduplication window in minutes. Must be 1 or greater when conversion_type is variable. To attribute all merit events without a deduplication window, use conversion_type: every (in which case this value is ignored).
